# Acueducto romano de Albarracín-Cella

Municipality: Monumento
Category: Albarracín, Gea de Albarracín y Cella
Registration Code: 40°25′47″N 1°25′00″O﻿ / ﻿40.429733, -1.416786﻿ (Acueducto romano de Albarracín-Cella)
Declaration Date: RI-51-0010933
Source: Wikipedia Annex List

No detailed article available.
instruction: Extrae la información del bien de interés cultural

target_schema.description:
Normalizes registration codes, dates, and identifiers from the Spanish BIC Registry.
Complexity: L3 (Standard Normalization).

official_name.description: The official name of the monument or protected site
official_name.title: Official Name

municipality.description: The municipality or city where the monument is located
municipality.title: Municipality

bic_category.description: The legal category of protection (e.g., Monumento, Jardín Histórico)

registration_code.description: The official registration ID (e.g., 'RI-51-0001091'). Must strictly follow the pattern.
registration_code.title: Registration Code

declaration_date.description: The date of the legal declaration in YYYY-MM-DD format (normalize from text)
declaration_date.title: Declaration Date

is_declared.description: True if the status is 'Declarado'; False if it is 'Incoado' (pending)
is_declared.title: Is Declared

target_schema.title: MonumentBIC

output.municipality: Albarracín, Gea de Albarracín y Cella
